common

Procs

proc createMessage(api: OpenAiApi; model: string; maxTokens: int;
                   prompt: string; system: string = ""): CreateMessageResp {.
    ...raises: [JsonError, ValueError, ZippyError, CatchableError, OpenAiError],
    tags: [RootEffect], forbids: [].}
Create a simple text message using the Anthropic Messages API. Source   Edit   
proc createMessage(api: OpenAiApi; req: CreateMessageReq): CreateMessageResp {.
    ...raises: [JsonError, ValueError, ZippyError, CatchableError, OpenAiError],
    tags: [RootEffect], forbids: [].}
Create a message using the Anthropic Messages API. Source   Edit   
proc createMessageWithTools(api: OpenAiApi; req: var CreateMessageReq;
                            tools: ResponseToolsTable; callback: proc () = nil): CreateMessageResp {....raises: [
    KeyError, ZippyError, CatchableError, OpenAiError, JsonError, ValueError,
    Exception], tags: [RootEffect], forbids: [].}
Create a message with tool calling loop. Automatically handles tool execution until the model stops requesting tools. Accepts ResponseToolsTable (same table used by Responses API) and converts ToolFunction entries to AnthropicTool format for the request. Source   Edit   
proc messageText(resp: CreateMessageResp): string {....raises: [KeyError],
    tags: [], forbids: [].}
Concatenate all text blocks from a message response. Source   Edit   
proc messageThinking(resp: CreateMessageResp): seq[ThinkingContentBlock] {.
    ...raises: [KeyError], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Extract all thinking blocks from a message response. Source   Edit   
proc messageToolUses(resp: CreateMessageResp): seq[ToolUseContentBlock] {.
    ...raises: [KeyError], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Extract all tool_use blocks from a message response. Source   Edit   
proc nextMessageEvent(s: OpenAIStream): Option[JsonNode] {....raises: [],
    tags: [ReadIOEffect, WriteIOEffect], forbids: [].}
Get the next event from a streaming message response. Returns the parsed JSON event or none when stream ends. Source   Edit   
proc streamMessage(api: OpenAiApi; req: CreateMessageReq): OpenAIStream {.
    ...raises: [JsonError, ValueError, CatchableError, OpenAiError],
    tags: [RootEffect], forbids: [].}
Stream a message response using the Anthropic Messages API. Source   Edit   
proc toMessageReq(req: CreateResponseReq): CreateMessageReq {.
    ...raises: [IOError, OSError, JsonParsingError, ValueError, KeyError],
    tags: [ReadIOEffect, WriteIOEffect], forbids: [].}
Convert a Responses API request into an Anthropic Messages API request. Source   Edit   
proc toOpenAiResponse(resp: CreateMessageResp): OpenAiResponse {.
    ...raises: [KeyError], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Wrap an Anthropic Messages API response into an OpenAiResponse shape so callers using Responses API types can consume it unchanged. Source   Edit
